signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 annual inflation rises to 2.16% YoY | NO** | **MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate for March 2026 increased slightly to 2.16% from 2.00% in February 2026, with monthly inflation at 0.34%.[2] This is the most recent data point available as of April 17, 2026, showing a modest uptick after stability around 2% earlier in the year (e.g., January 2026 at 2.01%).[
